text:
The Olympic and Paralympic Games are serious business for the elite athletes taking part, but for the fans it will be an amazing, awesome and fun celebration of sport.

The Games take place every four years and each time we meet a new mascot! For Paris 2024, it's time to say hello to The Phryges.

They are inspired by the Phrygian hats which are connected to the French Republic and go back even further as a symbol of liberty.

According toOlympics.com: "The motto of the Olympic Phryge and Paralympic Phryge is: Alone we go faster, but together we go further, representing the ways in which the mascots, and the people of the world, can make each other better by working side-by-side."

The Phryges are the latest in a long line of mascots and you can see them all on theofficial Olympics website. Who is your favourite?

For all the latest news from Paris 2024 click here!

We want you to getbehind Team Ireland- and keep an eye on RTÉjr socials too...

title: Say bonjour to the Paris 2024 Olympic and Paralympic mascots!
description: The Olympic Phryge and Paralympic Phryge are the official Paris 2024 mascots. Follow all the action across RTÉ.
